label: Regents
description: Practice for the New York State Regents exams — real released questions, scored the way the exam scores them.
intro: Authentic preparation built from real, released New York State Regents questions, each cited to the exam it came from. Multiple-choice is checked instantly; the constructed-response problems are scored against the official NYSED rubric — the way a real grader awards credit — so you practice not just the math, but how the points are earned. Every set reports a projected performance level and shows where you're solid versus where to keep working.
